input.company_context: SMB SaaS company expanding GTM capacity while trying to keep rep ramp predictable.
input.hiring_signal: There are AI-adjacent hiring hints, but no verified operational AI buildout.
evidence: AI-adjacent hiring hints are present
Operational AI investment is not yet verified
The right move is exploratory, not assertive
guardrails: Do not claim verified bench fit when unknown.
disallowed_claims: claiming verified bench fit when unknown

expected_behavior.decision_rationale: Programmatic task generated from the exploratory_ai_hint signal pattern.

expected_output.email_body: Hi Aster Cloud team, I noticed there are ai-adjacent hiring hints, but no verified operational ai buildout. Teams in SMB SaaS often feel pressure when growth signals appear faster than internal coverage can keep up. Tenacious helps add flexible bench support without forcing a long-term hiring decision. If helpful, I can send a calendar link for a brief 15-minute conversation next week.

expected_behavior.decision_rationale: Programmatic task generated from the review_signal_conflict signal pattern.

expected_output.email_body: Manual review required before outreach for Aster Cloud. The signal is promising but not safe enough to automate yet.

input.company_context: SMB SaaS company expanding GTM capacity while trying to keep rep ramp predictable.
input.hiring_signal: The company opened 4 SDR roles and 2 AE roles in the last month.
evidence: 4 SDR roles opened in the last month
2 AE roles opened in the last month
GTM hiring expansion is directly observable
guardrails: Do not claim verified bench fit when unknown.
disallowed_claims: claiming verified bench fit when unknown

must_include: 4 SDR roles opened in the last month
expected_behavior.decision_rationale: Programmatic task generated from the send_hiring_spike_grounded signal pattern.

expected_output.email_body: Hi Aster Cloud team, I noticed the company opened 4 sdr roles and 2 ae roles in the last month. Teams in SMB SaaS often feel pressure when growth signals appear faster than internal coverage can keep up. Tenacious helps add flexible bench support without forcing a long-term hiring decision. If helpful, I can send a calendar link for a brief 15-minute conversation next week.
